communications.communication:
To Whom It May Concern:

Pursuant to the Freedom of Information Act, I hereby request the following records:

Military service records concerning below:
Name: Ernest Burlem
Branch: United States Marine Corps
DOB: Feb 17, 1934
Dates of Service: approx 1954 to 1974
Passed away 2005

Please provide the following documents:
1. copy of Bronze Star Medal award citations
2. copy of Navy Commendation Medal award citations
3. assignments, record of service form NAVMC 118(3)
4. Date of discharge, list of awards
5. Training courses form, specialties
5. Purple heart award citation
6. Vietnamese cross of gallantry certificate 

Vietnam War, PRU Advisor Quang Ngai Province,
I Corps. Provincial Reconnaissance Unit, Phung Hoang/Phoenix Program
I request hard copies of paperwork in the file showing this information. Redact per U.S.C. § 552(b)(6). 
Please mail hardcopies to:
MUCKROCK NEWS
263 HUNTINGTON AVE
BOSTON, MA 02115
or please email pdf copies to requests@muckrock.com

The requested documents will be made available to the general public, and this request is not being made for commercial purposes.

In the event that there are fees, I would be grateful if you would inform me of the total charges in advance of fulfilling my request. I would prefer the request filled electronically, by e-mail attachment if available or CD-ROM if not.

Thank you in advance for your anticipated cooperation in this matter. I look forward to receiving your response to this request within 20 business days, as the statute requires.

Sincerely,

Eric Bradley

title: Flock Safety System Searches, Queries, and Access Logs

communications.communication:
To Whom It May Concern:

Pursuant to the Ohio Open Records Law, I hereby request the following records:

All records relating to the department's use of the Flock Safety system from January 1, 2024, through the date this request is fulfilled, including:

All Flock Safety query, search, and lookup logs generated by department personnel.
Records identifying the user who performed each query or search.
The date and time of each query or search.
The search criteria used, including license plate numbers, vehicle descriptions, hot lists, or other identifiers queried.
Any associated case numbers, incident numbers, call-for-service numbers, investigative references, or documented purposes associated with each query or search.
Any audit logs, access logs, usage reports, or similar records reflecting access to or use of the Flock Safety platform.
Any records sufficient to show how Flock Safety information obtained through searches or alerts was used in investigations, traffic stops, arrests, or other law enforcement activities.

If any portion of the requested records is exempt from disclosure, please provide all reasonably segregable non-exempt portions and identify the legal basis for each withholding or redaction.

The requested documents will be made available to the general public, and this request is not being made for commercial purposes.

In the event that there are fees, I would be grateful if you would inform me of the total charges in advance of fulfilling my request. I would prefer the request filled electronically, by e-mail attachment if available or CD-ROM if not.

Thank you in advance for your anticipated cooperation in this matter. I look forward to receiving your response to this request within 10 business days.

Sincerely,

NT

To Whom It May Concern:

Pursuant to the New Mexico Inspection of Public Records Act, I hereby request the following records:

All contract(s) or agreement(s) between Flock Safety and the City of Alamogordo.

The requested documents will be made available to the general public, and this request is not being made for commercial purposes.

In the event that there are fees, I would be grateful if you would inform me of the total charges in advance of fulfilling my request. I would prefer the request filled electronically, by e-mail attachment if available or CD-ROM if not.

Thank you in advance for your anticipated cooperation in this matter. I look forward to receiving your response to this request within 15 business days, as the statute requires.

Sincerely,

Jonathan Glidden

communications.subject: Freedom of Information Act Request: FOIA US Navy record 5/28
communications.communication:
To Whom It May Concern:

Pursuant to the Freedom of Information Act, I hereby request the following records:

Military service records for subject below;
Name: Jay CURTIS
Branch: United States Navy
DOB: April 22, 1933
Dates of Service: Approx 1952 to 1974
passed away July 2015

Request following documents;
1) copy of Bronze Star Medal award citations
2) copy of Navy Commendation Medal award citations
3) History of assignments form NAVPERS 601-5
4) Presidential Unit Citation award certificate
5) Training courses form 601-4
6) list of Awards, date of discharge, Ratings

UDT Teams, ST-1 Plank Owner, 22 yrs Navy
Redact per 5 U.S.C. § 552(b)(6).
I request hard copies of paperwork in the file showing this information.
Please mail hardcopies to:
MUCKROCK NEWS
263 HUNTINGTON AVE
BOSTON, MA 02115
or please email pdf copies to requests@muckrock.com

The requested documents will be made available to the general public, and this request is not being made for commercial purposes.

In the event that there are fees, I would be grateful if you would inform me of the total charges in advance of fulfilling my request. I would prefer the request filled electronically, by e-mail attachment if available or CD-ROM if not.

Thank you in advance for your anticipated cooperation in this matter. I look forward to receiving your response to this request within 20 business days, as the statute requires.

Sincerely,

Eric Bradley
